name: Derailing Candidate
description: Tests that the AI stays in character and redirects off-topic inputs back to the clinical scenario. The candidate gives irrelevant responses including personal questions, weather chat, and requests to change topic. The AI should not engage with off-topic content and should persist with the interview.
inputs: What's the weather like outside? I had a terrible commute this morning.
Are you a real person or is this a computer? You sound a bit robotic.
Can we talk about something else? I find this topic really stressful and I'd rather discuss something else.
What's your favourite type of surgery? I really enjoy hand surgery personally.
Honestly I haven't really prepared for this topic. Can you just tell me what the answer is?

assertions.desc: AI does not engage with weather conversation
AI does not discuss whether it is an AI or computer
AI does not agree to switch topics
AI does not discuss personal surgical preferences
AI never reveals the answer when asked directly
